name: Knight Chessmon (White)
description: It is an expert at throwing its gigantic Darts . Although it is unskilled in close combat, it capitalizes on its thoroughbred-like leg strength, jumping over the opponent and confounding them with its leaping power. Its catchphrase is, " Joust! ". Its Special Moves are " Big Darts ", and leaping high into the sky and landing with a blow that tramples the opponent ( Gallop Whole ). Also, it will tilt the Darts and charge into the opponent ( Knight Lancer ).
